title: Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada, Vol 37, No 9, September 2017 - Special Issue: The Food Environment in Canada, Part I - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada, Vol 37, No 9, September 2017

## Volume 37 · Number 9 · September 2017

### Special Issue: The Food Environment in Canada, Part I
- Commentary – Food for thought on food environments in Canada Lana Vanderlee, Mary R. L’Abbé
- The healthfulness and prominence of sugar in child-targeted breakfast cereals in Canada Monique Potvin Kent, Cher Cameron, Sarah Philippe
- Food marketing to children in Canada: a settings-based scoping review on exposure, power and impact Rachel Prowse
- Development, reliability and use of a food environment assessment tool in supermarkets of four neighbourhoods in Montréal, Canada Élise Jalbert-Arsenault, Éric Robitaille, Marie-Claude Paquette
- Support for healthy eating at schools according to the comprehensive school health framework: evaluation during the early years of the Ontario School Food and Beverage Policy implementation Taryn Orava, Steve Manske, Rhona Hanning
- The Ontario Food and Nutrition Strategy: identifying indicators of food access and food literacy for early monitoring of the food environment Beatrice A. Boucher, Elizabeth Manafò, Meaghan R. Boddy, Lynn Roblin, Rebecca Truscott
- Other PHAC publications
